---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}

library(tidycensus)
library(tidyverse)

census_api_key("", overwrite = TRUE)
```

## Variable Selection

```{r variables}
PUMS_VARS <- c(
  "SEX",    # _SEX: 1=Male, 2=Female
  "AGEP",   # _AGEG5YR: continuous age, binned to 13 five-year groups below
  "RAC1P",  # _RACE: race alone (combined with HISP for NH categories)
  "HISP",   # _RACE: hispanic origin (01=Not Hispanic, 02-24=Hispanic)
  "SCHL",   # _EDUCAG: educational attainment (collapsed to 4 levels)
  "HINCP",  # _INCOMG1: household income (inflation-adjusted, collapsed to 7 levels)
  "ADJINC", # income inflation adjustment factor 
  "PUMA"    # substate geography for county crosswalk 
  # PWGTP (person weight) and ST (state) are always returned automatically
)

states_list <- c(state.abb, "DC")

cat("Variables to pull:", paste(PUMS_VARS, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("States to pull:   ", length(states_list), "\n")
```

---

## Pull PUMS Data

```{r pull-pums, cache=TRUE}
message("Pulling 2020-2024 ACS 5-year PUMS for all states")

pums_raw <- map_dfr(states_list, function(st) {
  message("  Pulling: ", st)
  tryCatch(
    get_pums(
      variables   = PUMS_VARS,
      state       = st,
      survey      = "acs5",
      year        = 2024,
      rep_weights = FALSE  # set TRUE if you need SDR standard errors on cell counts
    ),
    error = function(e) {
      message("  ERROR on ", st, ": ", e$message)
      NULL
    }
  )
})

cat("Raw PUMS rows pulled:", nrow(pums_raw), "\n")
```

---

## Filter to Adults 18+

BRFSS only surveys non-institutionalized adults 18 and older.

```{r}
pums_adults <- pums_raw %>%
  filter(as.integer(AGEP) >= 18)

cat("Adult rows (18+):", nrow(pums_adults), "\n")
```

---

## Inflation-Adjust Household Income

The PUMS User Guide says to divide `ADJINC` by 1,000,000 and multiply by `HINCP`
to convert to 2024 dollars. Group quarters residents (nursing homes, dorms)
have blank `HINCP` and are dropped in the NA filter downstream.

```{r}
pums_adults <- pums_adults %>%
  mutate(HINCP_adj = as.numeric(HINCP) * (as.numeric(ADJINC) / 1e6))

cat("Income range (2024 dollars):",
    range(pums_adults$HINCP_adj, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```
```{r}
# write_csv(pums_adults, "pums_adults.csv")
head(pums_adults,10)
```
